programmes.show_description: Teleshopping.
Action-packed crime comedy film sequel starring Bruce Willis and Helen Mirren, 2013. Frank Moses and his team of hapless heroes are tasked with finding a dangerous nuclear weapon.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
James celebrates the Easter weekend of 2026 with Patsy Kensit - who talks about a new series of Pilgrimage - chefs Ryan and Liam Simpson-Trotman and Lisa Goodwin-Allen, and forager Alysia Vasey.
Jimmy and Shivi are this time joined by musician Tanita Tikaram for homemade pet treats, Florida doughnuts, and a city beaver rewilding project.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_name: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programmes.show_description: Joining Alan at Manor Farm for a special Easter Sunday show are Dame Sheila Hancock, West End star Julian Ovenden, and some cute puppies to capture our hearts.
Documentary series. It's scanning time on the farm! After a tricky tupping season, the family find out whether the three male tups have earned their keep and got the ewes in lamb.
Alan Titchmarsh and his team head to Derbyshire to build an exciting garden for sprightly D-Day veteran Jack Parrott and his wife of 68 years Margaret.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
The auditions continue as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges as they try to win themselves a coveted space in the semi-finals.

programmes.show_name: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programmes.show_description: Gene Wilder is the eccentric recluse in Roald Dahl's 70s classic. When he offers the chance to tour his chocolate factory, no one wants it more than young Charlie Bucket.

Three more famous faces join Ben Shephard in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity - taking on the machine this time are comedian Roisin Conaty and TV presenting pals Chris Bavin and Jordan Banjo.
All that stands between Callum from Nuneaton, Miriam from Lancashire, Hyder from Glasgow, Linda from London and thousands of pounds is the small matter of one of the Chasers.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Marlon is devastated. Cain is rocked. Kerry is riddled with guilt.

Ben forces Maggie to reveal that Alan was not his father - but can she keep Jim McDonald a secret? Meanwhile, Debbie encounters Carl upon her release from custody, and Sam reluctantly accepts Will's apology.
A student is found dead, and Grace digs into mysterious happenings on a university campus. But when things take a more sinister turn, it's a race to find the killer.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Simon Pegg stars in this smash-hit comedy thriller. A hot-shot young London cop is sent to a quiet rural posting but uncovers a seedy hotbed of murderous mayhem.
Teleshopping.
Giant reptile and giant gorilla thrash it out - with humanity caught in the balance. Don't miss the action-adventure sequel starring Alexander Skarsgård & Millie Bobby Brown.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
News, current affairs and lively debate.
Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.
The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Charlotte Church, Melvin Odoom, and Katherine Ryan all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Coronation Street stars Lucy Fallon, Julia Goulding, Jack P Shepherd and Colson Smith go head-to-head in a battle to win big money for charity.

programmes.show_name: ITV Racing Live: Irish Grand National
programmes.show_description: Rishi Persad presents live coverage of racing from Fairyhouse, Plumpton and Kempton. Today's feature race is the Irish Grand National.

Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which three celebrities take on a magnificent machine in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity - the stars on this show are Janette Manrara, Ade Adepitan, and Sarah Millican.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

Bradley Walsh hosts as Christine Ohuruogu, Max George, Maisie Smith and Owain Wyn-Evans hope to win thousands of pounds for their chosen charity as they take on one of the country's finest quiz brains... but have they got what it takes?
Rhona has a big decision to make. Cain confides in Moira. Kerry is furious.
Ronnie learns of Carl's latest ploy to extort cash from Debbie, Ben reels from the paternity revelation, Jodie joins David on his day off, and Hope taunts Will in front of Sam.
They survived the Australian jungle or the Welsh castle, but now the most memorable campmates from I'm A Celebrity... return to South Africa and battle to become a Legend.
ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.
Lee Mack hosts the quiz show spin-off where those who make it through to the one per cent question can play again and win up to 500,000 pounds if it is not answered correctly.
Jeremy Clarkson hosts the quiz where six players race to answer timed questions and hope to win one million pounds, but it all comes down to who's in the Hot Seat at the end.
